paper_title: Graph Representation Learning via Aggregation Enhancement
failure_detail: Code has dependencies (faiss, graph_self_supervised_learning, graph_supervised_learning, hydra, matplotlib, ogb, omegaconf, pandas, pytorch_lightning, scipy (+8 more)) but no requirements file; env-like files found at unexpected paths: graph_supervised_learning/requirements.txt, graph_self_supervised_learning/requirements.txt
